required_skills: Interaction Design Principles and Behavioral Pattern Design
High-Fidelity Interactive Prototyping for Complex User Flows
Micro-interaction and Animation Design and Specification
Gesture and Touch Interaction Design for Mobile and Tablet
State Design including Empty, Loading, Error, and Success States
Mental Model Mapping and Affordance Design
Feedback Loop and System Response Design
Design Handoff with Precise Motion and Interaction Specifications
Cross-platform Interaction Consistency across Web, iOS, and Android
preferred_skills: Proficiency in code-based prototyping using Framer, HTML/CSS, or React
3D interaction and immersive experience design for AR/VR
Voice UI and conversational interaction design
Game design principles and gamification interaction patterns
Eye-tracking and biometric usability research for interaction validation
Haptic feedback design for mobile interaction
Physics-based animation and spring dynamics prototyping
Accessibility interaction patterns for keyboard navigation and screen readers
responsibilities: Design and prototype complex interaction patterns and user flows using tools such as Figma, ProtoPie, or Framer, capturing every state, transition, and edge case in high fidelity
Define micro-interaction specifications including timing, easing curves, spring physics, and trigger-action-feedback loops for motion designers and front-end engineers to implement
Map user mental models and cognitive affordances to ensure that interaction behaviors are intuitive, learnable, and consistent with established platform conventions
Design comprehensive state matrices covering empty, loading, partial, error, and success states for every interactive component and screen in the product
Conduct interaction-focused usability tests using prototypes to evaluate learnability, efficiency, and error recovery, iterating designs based on observed user behavior
Collaborate with UI designers and visual designers to ensure motion and interaction decisions complement the overall visual design language and brand experience
Create detailed interaction design documentation and annotation guides that give engineering teams the precise specifications needed to implement interactions at production quality
Design gesture-based and touch interaction patterns for mobile and tablet surfaces, incorporating platform-native gestures and adhering to iOS HIG and Material Design motion guidelines
Partner with accessibility engineers to ensure all interaction patterns support keyboard navigation, focus management, and screen reader compatibility per WCAG and ARIA standards
Contribute to the interaction design principles and motion language sections of the product design system, standardizing reusable interaction patterns across teams
